'''DS-73-5''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln starfighter]]<ref name="TCG" /> which was manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].<ref name="DB" /> The [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] was active<ref name="TCG" /> around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="Note">The ''[[A New Hope (TCG)|A New Hope]]'' expansion of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]'' takes place around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The "DS-73-5" name was coined by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in their [[2003]] [[Battle of Yavin (TCG)|''Battle of Yavin'']] expansion of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''. DS-73-5's card uses an [[:File:TIE DS735.png|image]]<ref name="TCG" />—taken from the [[1977]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>—of a TIE fighter that was previously identified as "[[Black 4]]" in the [[1996]] ''[[A New Hope Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="B4card">{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Black 4}}</ref> This article treats the TIE fighter in the ''Star Wars Trading Card Game'' DS-73-5 card image as a misidentified Black 4, and further avoids linking the DS-73-5 name to any of the onscreen TIE fighters in the 1977 film.
